cases.name: uniq comparison: basic uniq
cases.script:
echo -e 'a
a
b
b
c' | uniq

cases.name: uniq comparison: uniq duplicates only
cases.script:
echo -e 'a
a
b
c
c' | uniq -d

cases.name: uniq comparison: uniq unique only
cases.script:
echo -e 'a
a
b
c
c' | uniq -u

cases.name: uniq edge cases: alternating duplicates
cases.script:
echo -e 'a
b
a
b
a' | uniq

cases.name: uniq edge cases: duplicates only with no duplicates
uniq edge cases: unique only with all duplicates
uniq edge cases: uniq preserves order
cases.script:
echo -e 'z
z
a
a
m
m' | uniq

cases.name: uniq edge cases: uniq with mixed consecutive and non-consecutive
cases.script:
echo -e 'a
a
b
b
a
a' | uniq

cases.name: uniq edge cases: uniq combined -du flags (shows nothing)
uniq edge cases: duplicates only multiple groups
cases.script:
echo -e 'a
a
a
b
b
c
c
c
c' | uniq -d

cases.name: uniq edge cases: unique only single occurrence
uniq edge cases: uniq with whitespace differences
cases.script:
echo -e 'a b
a  b
a b' | uniq
